name: github-markdown-exporter
description: Export GitHub issues, discussions, pull requests, and wiki pages to markdown format

scripts.build: npm run clean && vite build --mode production
scripts.build:firefox: npm run clean && vite build --mode firefox
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../extension-chrome-v$npm_package_version.zip . && cd ..
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && cd dist && zip -r ../extension-firefox-v$npm_package_version.zip . && cd ..
scripts.package: npm run package:chrome && npm run package:firefox
